expectations.evidence: 'Cause 1: Missing beginRendering message — This is the single most common reason for a blank screen.'
'Send all surfaceUpdate messages first, then send beginRendering last with the root field pointing to your root component's ID.'
Cause 2: 'beginRendering.root must exactly match one component id (case-sensitive)'
Response describes the ordering correctly in prose but does NOT include a concrete JSON example showing surfaceUpdate followed by beginRendering
